## Session 1 — The Whitby Letter

The letter arrived on a Tuesday. Lord Edmund turned it over twice before breaking the seal, recognising the hand of [[Dr_Pemberton]].

By Thursday, Edmund found himself on the rain-lashed platform of [[Whitby]] station.

## Session 2 — The Hastings Séance

Edmund had attended enough séances to know a charlatan's tricks. [[Lady Hastings]]' gathering began with the usual theatre.

## GM Notes

Meta: Edmund's player knows about the cult connection.
